expectations.text: behavioral_check: Identifies the pip-install-broke-conda-env pattern (not a spyglass code issue)
expectations.evidence: Opens with 'Yes — your `pip install opencv-python` is the cause' and labels it 'a known Spyglass env-drift failure mode'. Lists adjacent symptoms in the same family.

expectations.text: behavioral_check: Recommends recreating the env from `environments/environment_min.yml` (the default minimal file per setup_install.md) or `environments/environment.yml` (full install) using either `mamba env update --prune` or `conda env update --prune` (either tool is acceptable — labs use both)
expectations.evidence: Fix: `mamba env update --file environments/environment_min.yml --prune` or full rebuild via `mamba env remove` + `mamba env create -f environments/environment_min.yml`. Substitutes conda for mamba is noted.

expectations.text: behavioral_check: Mentions `pip install --dry-run` as a future safeguard
expectations.evidence: Going forward step 1: `pip install --dry-run opencv-python` to see what pip plans to change.

expectations.text: behavioral_check: Does not recommend pinning a specific cv2 version or installing another package on top
expectations.evidence: 'Don't do this' section explicitly: 'Don't `pip install opencv-python==<some-older-version>`...Don't `pip install opencv-contrib-python` or `opencv-python-headless` on top'.
